name: Pappadeaux Seafood Kitchen
newDesc: Louisiana-style seafood chain known for fried shrimp, crawfish, and stuffed redfish. Large portions, lively atmosphere, and a reliable happy hour across multiple Houston-area locations.

name: Pretty Bird
oldFragment: Multiple locations now open including Sugar House and Park City.
newDesc: Chef Viet Pham's Nashville-style hot chicken has become a Salt Lake sensation. Perfectly crispy fried chicken at customizable spice levels on a brioche bun, now across multiple SLC-area locations.

name: Slackwater
oldFragment: Wood-fired pizza and craft beer in historic downtown Ogden.
newDesc: Wood-fired pizza and craft beer from a Utah brewpub chain. The Margherita is excellent and the beer selection spans Utah breweries. Multiple Salt Lake-area locations — the original Ogden taproom is the flagship.
